title: Boundless Blocks
description: A Create focused SMP for players from around the world.
body:
BoundlessBlocks Modpack

A lightweight Create-focused experience built for long-term worlds.

BoundlessBlocks is a curated modpack centered around the Create ecosystem. It keeps things clean, stable, and performance-friendly while enhancing the mechanical, agricultural, and building aspects of Minecraft without adding bloat.

Whether you’re joining our official server or using the pack privately, this modpack is designed for players who enjoy engineering, aesthetics, collaboration, and long-term worldbuilding.

⭐ Features
🔧 Create-Centered Gameplay

A tightly curated selection of Create addons

Meaningful farming, cooking, and building expansions

No unnecessary tech mods or progression clutter

Perfect balance between creativity and performance

💾 Stable & Long-Term

Lightweight and optimized for both low-end and high-end setups

Excellent for megabases, factories, town projects, and SMP worlds

Monthly updates that are voted on by the community (for the official server)

🎨 Build & Decor Freedom

Additional decor blocks and styling options

Improved kitchen, storage, and farming workflows

Everything kept within the “Create vibe”

🖥️ Official BoundlessBlocks Server (Optional)

If you want an active, friendly Create SMP, our long-term server uses this modpack and is open to new members.

Server Highlights

🌐 Custom domains & infrastructure

💾 3 years of hosting prepaid — guaranteed longevity

🛠 Daily active admin for stability and support

🤝 Friendly, cooperative community

📦 Monthly community-voted content updates

🔒 Simple whitelist system for safety

How to Join the Server

Install the modpack: mods.boundlessblocks.com

Connect to join.boundlessblocks.com to complete quick verification

Join the world at play.boundlessblocks.com

The join server will provide a link to the Discord

Vote on mods

Meet other players

Help shape the world

Note: The modpack works perfectly for singleplayer and private servers — the official server is just an extra option.

🌱 Who This Pack Is For

Players who enjoy Create engineering and automation

Builders wanting a cozy, collaborative experience

Anyone seeking a stable, long-term world that won’t reset

People tired of overly bloated packs — this is clean, curated, and intentional

💬 Final Notes

BoundlessBlocks is built around creativity, longevity, and community.
Whether you’re automating your first millstone or designing a megafactory, this modpack provides the structure and stability to keep your world thriving.

We hope you enjoy the experience — and if you join the server, welcome to BoundlessBlocks!
